flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Loyola University Maryland fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Loyola University Maryland are 29% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($82.7k vs $64.1k).
